title: Plaintiffs allege the use of scents discriminates against them under the Ada
abstract: Are you ever guilty of dismissing scents as mere sensory experiences? Well, plaintiffs have now taken this issue to court, claiming that certain odors constitute discrimination under the Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA). This case turns an everyday experience into a legal battleground and highlights new challenges for ADA in real-world applications. Join us for the smell test!
abstract_zh: 你是不是觉得气味也能成为歧视的理由？原告们就因为这个奇葩理由告上了法庭，声称某些地方的特定气味让他们不舒服。这简直就是把“气味”这种日常的东西升级成了法律争议的大boss！这场官司不仅闻到了酸爽的味道，还揭示了无障碍法案（ADA）在现实生活中的新挑战。要不要来围观一下？
